action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline DINOv2 + class-balanced sampling achieved val_bacc=0.789 but test_bacc=0.613 (large gap, domain shift to L100). Per-class: cat (0.26), bobcat (0.37), empty (0.38) struggle. raccoon, coyote, dog do well. Analysis: Big domain gap. Need stronger augmentation, longer training, and possibly EMA/test-time augmentation. The class-balanced sampler may overfit rare classes' source domain features. Decision: Train longer (8 epochs) with stronger augmentation (RandAugment), keep balanced sampling but with sqrt weights to avoid overfitting rare classes, use larger crop variation. Use TTA in predict.py.
